data.title: Why Is Stock Market Closed Today? A Quick Guide To Markets, Banking Hours And What's Closed On Good Friday 2025
data.description: U.S. stock markets will be closed on Friday, April 18 in observance of Good Friday, a Christian holiday that commemorates the crucifixion and death of Jesus Christ.

data.title: Chinese Firms Are Reportedly Using Shell Entities To Dodge Trump's Tariffs
data.description: Chinese firms are reportedly using shell entities to circumvent the hefty tariffs imposed by the Trump administration.

data.title: Justin Sun Has 'No Intention Of Selling' ETH Despite A 52% YTD Slump—Crypto Mogul Says Tron Will Continue Collaboration With Ethereum
data.description: Cryptocurrency mogul Justin Sun declared Thursday that he won’t dump his Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) holdings despite the continued decline in its value.

data.title: Billionaire Peter Hargreaves-Backed Fund Offloads Stake In Meta, Microsoft Amid Global Economic Woes
data.description: The Blue Whale Growth fund, backed by the English billionaire Peter Hargreaves, has sold its entire stake in Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) and Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT), citing fears of a global economic slowdown.

data.title: Tesla Price Target Slashed To $275 By Barclays Amid Margin Woes, But Elon Musk's FSD Push Could Lift Sentiment
data.description: Barclays has revised its price target for Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) from $325 to $275, attributing the downgrade to weak fundamentals.
